channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US Faces Belgium in World Cup After Trump-Infantino Red Card Call
item.description: US striker Folarin Balogun is expected to start against Belgium in the Round of 16 after FIFA allowed him to play.

item.title: Fast Walkers in Their 80s Halve Cognitive Decline Risk, Study Finds
item.description: A study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits found fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline.

item.title: 7 creative ways to turn leftovers into new meals and reduce food waste
item.description: Audience members share their favorite leftover recipes, including stuffed peppers and biryani casserole.

item.title: Marriage used to guarantee citizenship, but now faces more obstacles
item.description: Spouses of U.S. citizens once held a privileged immigration status, but that has changed under current policies.
